name: BOLLINGER INNOVATIONS, INC.
business: Mullen Automotive Inc. is a Southern California-based technology and electric vehicle company that builds and delivers commercial electric trucks in Classes 1 through 6, including the Mullen ONE cargo van, Mullen THREE chassis cab, and Bollinger B4 chassis cab. The company sells to fleet operators, commercial customers, and government entities through a network of dealer partnerships and direct sales. It also develops battery technology, including solid-state batteries, and intends to sell ZEV credits to other OEMs.

exposures.sentence: The Company entered the Commercial Truck Business executing two opportunistic acquisitions in the later part of 2022.
Mullen has expanded its battery development and manufacturing capabilities by purchasing battery related assets of Romeo Power in September 2023 for $3.5 million.
The registration and sale of Zero-Emission Vehicles (ZEVs) in California will earn us ZEV credits that we can sell to other Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs).

catalysts.event: Launch of Bollinger B5 Class 5 truck
catalysts.sentence: Bollinger is in development to launch a Class 5 (B5) in CY 2025 and Class 6 truck in the coming years.
Bollinger expects to grow their national network to 100-plus dealership locations in 2025.
